en.title: Information-Induced Training Geometry: Completion, Stratification, and Structured Expressivity
en.short: How partial information channels determine, and fail to determine, full optimizer geometry.
en.abstract: Training data constrains optimizer geometry through the covectors visible to a declared information channel. This manuscript resolves the full-column-rank SPD channel under affine-invariant geometry, giving an explicit nearest completion, exact reduction, gauge-invariant rank stratification, and structured expressivity tests for diagonal and block optimizer families.

zh.title: 信息诱导训练几何：完备化、分层与结构表达能力
zh.short: 部分信息通道如何决定，又如何无法决定，完整的优化器几何。
zh.abstract: 训练数据通过某个信息通道可见的余向量约束优化器几何。本文在仿射不变几何下解决满列秩 SPD 通道问题，给出显式的最近完备化、精确约化、规范不变的秩分层，以及针对对角和分块优化器族的结构表达能力检验。
